ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn West and Blaine Yamauchi for and with Shaun Moynahan.

The Court noted that Mr. Pilgram is not present. Mr. Yamauchi stated that they have had no communication with Mr. Pilgram and that they have nothing to add to the petition. The Court granted the First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
